about.vision.label: Our vision
about.vision.title: We believe healthcare begins with trust, continues with expertise, and is completed with humanity.
about.vision.description: To be the region’s most trusted healthcare platform—making high-quality medical care accessible to everyone.
about.vision.imageAlt: Wellness still life with water, towel, and natural light
about.mission.label: Our mission
about.mission.title: Simplifying healthcare by connecting patients with reliable, high-quality services.
about.mission.description: We support you at every step, helping you make health decisions based on clear knowledge and a safe experience.
about.mission.bullet1: Connecting patients with accredited rehabilitation and wellness centers
about.mission.bullet2: Providing trusted medical travel options inside and outside the region
about.mission.bullet3: Ensuring transparency in information and services
about.mission.bullet4: Offering continuous support before, during, and after your treatment journey
about.mission.imageAlt: Reception staff assisting a patient in a modern clinic
about.coreValues.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
about.coreValues.quality.title: Quality standards
about.coreValues.quality.description: A rigorous screening process that ensures only the best healthcare providers.
about.coreValues.transparency.title: Transparency
about.coreValues.transparency.descriptio: Clear prices, honest communication, and verified information.
about.coreValues.patient.title: Patient-centric approach
about.coreValues.patient.description: Every decision we make prioritizes patient well-being and satisfaction.
about.ceo.message: At Tashafy, we believe healthcare should be accessible, transparent, and patient-centered. We built our platform from the ground up with one goal: making your healthcare journey as smooth and stress-free as possible.
about.ceo.callout: Whether you are looking for post-surgical rehabilitation, working toward wellness goals, or planning medical travel, our team is committed to supporting you every step of the way with expert guidance and compassionate care.
about.ceo.name: Dr. Abdullah Al-Mansour
about.services.subtitle: Through the Tashafy platform, we deliver integrated services including:
about.services.support.title: Customer and family support
about.services.support.description: We provide ongoing support for clients and their families throughout treatment for a complete experience—including guidance, emotional support, and coordination.
about.services.travel.title: Travel and accommodation
about.services.travel.description: We arrange flights and hotels for companions, coordinate arrival at your treatment destination, and provide dedicated representatives to follow each patient’s case in every country.
about.services.centers.title: Connecting clients with treatment centers
about.services.centers.description: We make it easy to reach rehabilitation and wellness centers carefully selected by experienced mental health consultants in Saudi Arabia.
about.services.referral.title: Streamlining referrals
about.services.referral.description: If you are referred by one of our partner physicians or mental health clinics, we manage every step of the referral—including coordination with the center and detailed progress reports for the referring physician.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: We know you have questions, and we have answers. Below you will find responses to common inquiries about Tashafy.
faq.q1: Why should I choose Tashafy for my healthcare journey?
faq.a1: Tashafy offers a unique blend of intuitive design, customizable features, and trusted partner networks, distinguishing it for effective healthcare coordination.
faq.q2: Is Tashafy suitable for international patients?
faq.a2: Yes. Tashafy is designed to support medical travel and international patients with accredited centers and end-to-end coordination.
faq.q3: How quickly can I get started with Tashafy?
faq.a3: You can create an account and explore services within minutes. Our team is available to guide you through booking and next steps.
faq.q4: Can I import my medical records or history?
faq.a4: We work with our partner centers to ensure your relevant medical information is shared securely when you choose to proceed with a booking.
faq.q5: Are there resources or guides available for patients?
faq.a5: Yes. We provide guides, FAQs, and dedicated support to help you understand options and prepare for your care.
faq.q6: What level of customization does Tashafy offer?
faq.a6: Services can be tailored to your needs, from rehabilitation and wellness to specialized medical care, with flexible booking and support.
faq.q7: How often does Tashafy update its offerings?
faq.a7: We regularly add new partners, services, and features to give you the best choices and experience.

testimonials.title: Success stories and customer opinions
testimonials.subtitle: We highly value our patients' opinions and always strive to improve our services. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we are committed to listening to your feedback and meeting your health needs. Share your experiences with us to elevate the level of care we provide.
testimonials.items.0.name: Ahmed Fouad
testimonials.items.0.quote: An excellent experience by all measures. Easy booking and precise follow-up from the team. Personal and professional attention made the treatment journey comfortable and effective.
testimonials.items.1.name: Layla Khalid
testimonials.items.1.quote: The nutritionist was the epitome of knowledge and professionalism. A customized nutrition program helped me achieve my health goals in a sustainable way.
testimonials.items.2.name: Salem Abdullah
testimonials.items.2.quote: Amazing results after stem cell therapy. Significant improvement in my health and an overall feeling of energy and vitality. Thanks to the outstanding medical team.
testimonials.items.3.name: Noura Mohammed
testimonials.items.3.quote: My experience with cosmetic surgery was wonderful. The doctor was patient and understanding, and the results exceeded my expectations. I recommend it to anyone seeking excellence.
testimonials.items.4.name: Faisal Mahmoud
testimonials.items.4.quote: A comprehensive physical therapy program. Noticeable improvement in movement and reduced pain. The team was cooperative and friendly, making the experience very positive.

specialties.title: Our centers' specialties
specialties.subtitle: World-class healthcare across the region
specialties.items.0.title: VIP Program
specialties.items.0.description: Luxury, personalized service for VIPs including premium accommodation, one-on-one therapy sessions, full privacy, and flexible scheduling to suit their lifestyle.
specialties.items.1.title: Aftercare
specialties.items.1.description: Ongoing support for people in recovery after primary treatment, including follow-up sessions, support groups, and counseling to maintain stable recovery.
specialties.items.2.title: Holistic Wellness
specialties.items.2.description: Combines physical, mental, and spiritual care for inner balance through yoga, meditation, therapeutic nutrition, and natural therapies.
specialties.items.3.title: Natural Weight Loss
specialties.items.3.description: Safe, natural weight-loss programs based on healthy nutrition, appropriate exercise, and emotional balance, without extreme diets or risky medications.
specialties.items.4.title: Eating Disorders
specialties.items.4.description: Comprehensive treatment for anorexia nervosa, bulimia, and emotional eating, combining nutritional, psychological, and family support when needed.
specialties.items.5.title: Physical Therapy
specialties.items.5.description: Restoring movement and strength after injury or surgery through advanced physiotherapy, including therapeutic exercise, massage techniques, and functional rehabilitation.
specialties.items.6.title: Sleep Disorders
specialties.items.6.description: Specialized program for insomnia, sleep disorders, and difficulty falling asleep using psychotherapy, behavior change, and deep relaxation.
specialties.items.7.title: Women and Special Categories
specialties.items.7.description: Treatment programs designed for women and groups needing privacy, including trauma survivors and those with sensitive psychological needs.
specialties.items.8.title: Addiction Treatment
specialties.items.8.description: Specialized, integrated treatment plans for addiction (substances, alcohol, internet, compulsive behaviors), with close follow-up to sustain recovery and prevent relapse.
specialties.items.9.title: Psychological Rehabilitation
specialties.items.9.description: Focus on accumulated psychological and emotional issues through individual and group therapy, helping patients understand themselves, manage behavior, and build resilience.
specialties.items.10.title: Detoxification
specialties.items.10.description: Detox is the first stage of recovery, clearing the body of harmful substances under full, round-the-clock medical supervision to ensure safety and prepare for the next phase.

blog.resourceCenter.title: Resource center
blog.resourceCenter.subtitle: What you need to know when taking your first steps
blog.detail.article.section1Body: Recent research shows that caring for physical and mental health together makes a meaningful difference in quality of life. Through our integrated programs, we help you find the right balance between mind and body, leading to noticeable gains in daily performance and overall wellbeing.
blog.detail.article.quoteText: “Health is not merely the absence of disease, but a state of complete physical, mental and social wellbeing.”
blog.detail.article.section2Body: Our centers combine the latest medical technologies with evidence-based traditional therapies. Our multidisciplinary team builds personalized treatment plans around each patient’s needs, focusing on long-term outcomes and sustainability.
blog.detail.article.stats.0.label: Successful cases each year
blog.detail.article.stats.1.label: Noticeable improvement within 6 weeks
blog.detail.article.stats.2.label: Patient satisfaction rate
blog.detail.article.programs.0: Physical rehabilitation programs: intensive physiotherapy, strength and flexibility training, and hydrotherapy.
blog.detail.article.programs.1: Mental wellness programs: individual and group counselling, relaxation techniques, and cognitive behavioural therapy.
blog.detail.article.programs.2: Therapeutic nutrition: personalized meal plans, regular follow-ups, and comprehensive health education.
blog.detail.article.programs.3: Invest in your health today for a better tomorrow. Our team is available around the clock to help you begin your recovery and wellness journey.
blog.detail.article.programs.4: Note: All programs and care plans are designed after a thorough medical assessment tailored to each patient.
blog.detail.article.inlineImageAlt: Dental professional providing care in a modern clinic

rehabilitation.detail.2.aboutP2: Our therapists use motion analysis and progressive loading to safely return you to sport or daily activities.
rehabilitation.detail.2.aboutP3: Education on injury prevention and load management is part of every program so results last beyond the clinic.
